subtitle: Time to make your predictions and win big prizes
soccerCardDesc: Browse upcoming and finished soccer matches. Place your bets on your favorite teams across La Liga and other competitions.
bettingRoomsDesc: Create your own private rooms or jump into existing ones. Compete with friends in group predictions.
comingSoonDesc: This section is coming soon — chats, notifications, and more social features are on the way!

streakPong.title: Streak Pong
streakPong.desc: Defend the goal for a random World Cup nation. Every save builds your streak — cash it out before you concede, or lose it all.
streakPong.hint: Move with mouse, touch or ↑/↓ · Cash out with Space or the button. Concede a goal and your unbanked streak is gone.

welcome.title: Welcome to FriendlyBet, {{name}}!
welcome.intro: We're glad to have you here. FriendlyBet is an independent initiative by a couple of geeks and sports fans who wanted to bring technology and the passion for football together.
welcome.whatYouCanDo: Here you can create rooms with your friends, predict the results of your favorite tournaments — including the 2026 World Cup — and compete for points in the ranking. Bets are friendly and points-based: no real money involved.
welcome.freeAccess: Access to the app is free of charge for a limited time.
welcome.thanks: We sincerely appreciate your support and the appropriate use of the platform. Enjoy the game!

announce.title: The World Cup begins! 🏆
announce.body: The group stage is over. Invite more friends and create your own rooms. Thanks for supporting the project with your <donate>donation</donate>. The next stages award more points to the winner — see it <about>here</about>.

wcGame.title: La Carrera del Campeón
wcGame.desc: Order every group, pick the best thirds and choose each winner up to the champion. Earn points as the real tournament unfolds.
wcGame.intro1: Drag the teams of each group into the final order you predict.
wcGame.intro2: Pick the 8 best third-placed teams — FIFA rules build your bracket.
wcGame.intro3: Choose a winner for every knockout match until your champion.
wcGame.intro4: You can save and exit anytime. Your progress is kept.
wcGame.scoringGroups: Exact group position: {{exact}} pts · qualifies in the other spot: {{qualify}} pt
wcGame.scoringKo: Team advances: {{r16}}-{{qf}}-{{sf}}-{{final}} pts per round · Champion: {{champ}} pts
wcGame.skip: Skip for now — I'll come back
wcGame.dragHint: Teams are pre-sorted by FIFA ranking. Drag to reorder them.
wcGame.thirdsHint: Select the 8 third-placed teams that advance to the Round of 32.
wcGame.doneDesc: Your bracket is in. Points arrive as real results come in — check the ranking as the tournament evolves.
wcGame.noPlayers: No predictions yet — be the first!
wcGame.loadError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
wcGame.koHint: Tap the team you think will win — your pick is saved and the next match appears.
